message.content:
1) Yes, on the left: a circular 'JSR' logo (with the letters "JSR" inside a circle) is followed by the wordmark text "John Shannon." (including the dot) immediately to its right.  
2) Yes, on the right: a theme toggle icon (sun/moon) is positioned next to a hamburger menu icon (three horizontal lines).  
3) Yes, the bar looks balanced and intentional—there is no large empty gap in the middle; the left (logo + text) and right (theme toggle + menu) elements are spaced to create visual equilibrium.  
4) Yes, the glass pill effect is visible: the navigation bar has a rounded, semi-transparent (glass-like) background with a subtle pill shape, giving it a modern, frosted appearance.
